tasks.title: Create repository-specific knowledge index
tasks.objective: Populate agent/knowledge/index.md with the repo's canonical files, areas, and context routes.
authority: Do not invent architecture not evidenced by repo files
acceptance_criteria: Canonical planning and progress files are listed
Context routes explain what to read for common task types
Stale or uncertain areas are explicitly marked
verification: Review index for concrete routes and uncertainty notes
tasks.stop_condition: Stop after the initial index is useful enough to route future tasks.
tasks.notes: Starter task. Replace or extend with product-specific graph.
